raw_consumer_statement: when i looked at my citi business card balance i noticed a {$59.00} charge from a company i have never heard of or done business with posted on XX/XX/XXXX. when i tried to dispute citi gave me a secondary box leading me to believe it was a monthly recurring charge and then gave me an error message when i click dispute. when i call citi on the number on the back of this card someone answered and asked what the issue was which was a charge dispute he then told me i was not in the business card department and transferred me to a new que with a XXXX minute wait. and did not assist me nore was i able to submit my dispute.
